One call = vault + policy setup.         User connects wallet, sets guardrails, we handle the rest. Flow: 1. User calls createVault(agent, maxPerAction, dailyLimit, approvedTokens) 2. Factory deploys a new AgentVault with user as owner 3. Factory sets the policy on AgentPolicy for the new vault 4. Factory approves the specified tokens 5. params.tokens: List of token addresses the agent is allowed to trade

approveToken(address,address).notice: Approve a new token for trading — only the vault's owner can call

createVault(address,uint256,uint256,addr.notice: Create a vault with guardrails in one transaction.

getVaults(address).notice: Get all vaults for a user

removeToken(address,address).notice: Remove a token from trading — only the vault's owner can call

revokePolicy(address).notice: Revoke the agent's policy entirely — emergency stop

updatePolicy(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Update guardrails for an existing vault — only the vault's owner can call
